scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @ia-financeira/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @ia-financeira/core build && corepack pnpm --filter @ia-financeira/database build && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @ia-financeira/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @ia-financeira/core build && corepack pnpm --filter @ia-financeira/database build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @ia-financeira/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @ia-financeira/core build && corepack pnpm --filter @ia-financeira/database build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
